meta.name: Simple
meta.description: 4-quadrant sampler world. UR: kick density (Y) + hihat density (X) @ 111 BPM. UL: same drum mirror @ 55.5 BPM with Portal-style granular send FX, plus corner-chaos at the far top-left of UL (50% reverse hihat / 20% octave-low hihat / 10% 32nd-roll / 33% reverse kick — all scaling linearly toward the opposite corner). BL: charlie. BR: rain. BL+BR crossfade and extend up into UL/UR via 2D audibility rectangles.
